case_title: CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES VS. DUSTIN ROSS BARCLAY et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD; INDEX, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERENCE BOARD ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL HEARING SET FOR JUL-14-2008 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES' PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. THE BOARD HAVING MADE ITS DETERMINATION ON A SUBSTANTIVE BASIS AND THAT STANDS AT THIS POINT GIVEN BOTH THE TIME AND THE RULES GOVERNING REVIEW. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
